title: Paper Bot Core
summary: Paper trading foundation. It reviews a Paper Trade Signal, checks the Paper Risk Gate, creates a Paper Decision, records Paper Trade Results, and points to the Next Safe Action.

steps.title: Paper Trade Signal
steps.summary: A Paper Trade Signal exists for paper review only.
steps.detail: MOCK_SIGNAL_001.json uses paper test symbol EUR_USD_MOCK and cannot route orders.

steps.title: Paper Decision
steps.summary: The Paper Decision is blocked until paper trade review conditions pass.
steps.detail: MOCK_DECISION_001.json blocks because confidence and sample size are not strong enough.

steps.title: Paper Risk Gate
steps.summary: The Paper Risk Gate blocks by default.
steps.detail: Latency, regime, confidence, and sample size must pass before paper simulation.

steps.title: Paper Trade
steps.summary: No Paper Trade Result is recorded while risk is blocked.

steps.title: Paper Scorecard
steps.summary: No score can be trusted before enough paper trade samples exist.
steps.detail: Scorecard fields include trade count, win rate, expectancy, profit factor, max drawdown, and confidence.

steps.title: Next Safe Action
steps.summary: Review the Paper Trade Signal and Paper Risk Gate before any paper simulation.
steps.detail: Keep Live Execution: BLOCKED and Broker/OANDA: BLOCKED.

scorecard.blocked_reason: No paper trade sample exists yet.

external_platform_rule.path: Trading Lab -> Tools / Connectors -> External Trading Platforms -> MetaTrader 5 / TradingView / TradersPost

next_safe_action: Run the Paper Bot Core readiness validator.
